name: WhatsApp / Políticos - Relatório Diário de Conversas

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  aa.id AS ai_assistant_id,
  aa.owner_name,
  aa.ai_assistant_name,
  aa.email AS recipient_email,
  ch.id,
  ch.session_id,
  ch.sender,
  ch.sender_name,
  ch.message_type,
  ch.user_message,
  ch.ai_response,
  ch.created_at,
  u.profile_name
FROM politicos.ai_assistant aa
LEFT JOIN politicos.conversation_history ch
  ON ch.ai_assistant_id = aa.id
 AND ch.created_at >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day')::timestamptz
 AND ch.created_at < CURRENT_DATE::timestamptz
LEFT JOIN politicos.users u
  ON ch.ai_assistant_id = u.ai_assistant_id
 AND ch.sender = u.phone
ORDER BY aa.ai_assistant_name, ch.session_id, ch.created_at
